---
title: "Taming the Hydra: Targeted Control-Flow Transformations for Dynamic Symbolic Execution"
date: 2026-04-09
year: 2026
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3798202"
venue: "OOPSLA 2026"
award: ""
code: "https://zenodo.org/records/19115620"
slides: ""
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2308.01554.pdf"
video: ""
author:
  - name: Charitha Saumya
  - name: Muhammad Hassan
  - name: Rohan Gangaraju
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
